CustomField.description: Premium support tier the account is entitled to (Standard, Premium, Premium 24x7, Strategic). Backed by Northstar_Support_Tier GVS; mirrored on Contract, Order, Quote, and Case so reps and CSMs see one consistent value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Entitled support tier. Drives Case routing SLA and the renewal motion.
CustomField.label: Support Tier
